text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's unusually quiet in the Kikuka Sho waiting
room.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki is practicing kata to hone her
concentration since we had talked about how
she'll need to be more focused than ever for this
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho is long and will be a great
challenge for Yaeno Muteki. She'll need to be
totally focused if she wants to run it well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems perfectly calm and collected, at least
in my eyes, but...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Inhale...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...It's nothing. Let's go forth.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Woo! It's Yaeno! I've been waiting for you!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(...Ahh, this is it. This pre-race energy fills me with
such anticipation and excitement.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(It scrubs all tranquility from my being and pushes
my desire to win past its boiling point!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (I'll have to take it up a notch!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ooohhh!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I breathe a sigh of relief upon hearing Yaeno
Muteki's battle cry rip through the electrified air.
She's finally acting like her usual pre-race self.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But not quite how she was before the Japanese
Derby. If possible, I'd like to feel that pure,
breathtaking intensity from back then.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You're ready to go, aren't you, Yaeno?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hi, Creek.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But I'm afraid I can't let you win today. I wasn't
able to run in the Derby, so...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'll make sure the Kikuka Sho is mine instead.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There are people waiting for me to win, you see. I
can't possibly keep them waiting any longer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'll have you know that I'm just as determined to
win.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Of course. Well, let's both give this our best shot!
